content.en:
For the overlord-level extra-dimensional forces, one more multi-dimensional treasure bottle will naturally help the strength skyrocket.

Of course, if the other party also has a fourth realm beyond the dimensional realm, the Blazing Sun Palace will not do it.

However, the Blazing Sun Palace sent a third realm to investigate, only to find that the Terran had the fourth realm, and immediately did not dare to deal with the Terran.

......

Blazing Sun Palace.

The Blazing Sun Realm Lord showed a look of confusion and shock: "A small territory over the Six Thousand Realm has actually given birth to a Fourth Realm Extradimensional Realm!!!

He also had to admit that the fourth realm named Ye Tian had a really good talent, chance, and luck.

Of course, he also guessed that Ye Tian must have a lot of treasures, otherwise it would be impossible for him to break through to the fourth realm without a reputation.

So on this day, he went to visit Ye Tian and peeked into Ye Tian's reality by the way.

Wow!

The Blazing Sun Realm Lord kept shuttling, crossing one extradimensional territory after another, and soon came to the side of the Six Thousand Realm.

"Such a weak void, it seems that a single blow can destroy an extradimensional territory!"

The Blazing Sun Realm Lord muttered.

He knew it wasn't a delusion, it was a fact.

With the strength of the Fourth Realm, such an extra-dimensional realm is too weak, and it can indeed be destroyed with a wave of his hand.

Soon, he was in the realm of the Terrans.

"The Blazing Sun Realm Lord of the Blazing Yang Palace, I have come to visit the Terran Ye Tian Realm Lord!"

The voice of the Blazing Sun Realm Lord came.

"Blazing Sun Realm Lord, what is this guy doing here?"

Ye Tian frowned.

The sudden visit of this Fourth Realm was somewhat unexpected by him, but it shouldn't have been against him, otherwise he would have attacked him directly.

"Blazing Sun Realm Lord, please come in!"

Ye Tian said.

Wow!

The void distorted, and a figure emerged, and it was the Blazing Sun Realm Lord.

The Blazing Sun Realm Lord came, and when he saw Ye Tian, he only felt that Ye Tian was extremely mysterious, and he couldn't see anything.

The Fourth Realm itself was difficult to spy on the mysteries of the other Fourth Realms, and he didn't think of the Great Realm Armor Technique, otherwise he would have guessed Ye Tian's identity.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian chatted with the Blazing Sun Realm Lord, as if they were having a good conversation.

However.

What Ye Tian didn't know was that the Blazing Sun Realm Lord had urged a fragment of an innate multi-dimensional supreme treasure, which was secretly urging.

I saw that in the extra-dimensional realm in his body, a broken treasure map emerged, and this treasure map was one of the fragments of the innate multi-dimensional treasure.

And this treasure map is releasing a shadowless and invisible light at this moment, and even the fourth realm can't spy on this light.

After this light enveloped Ye Tian, he invisibly spied on the many treasures hidden in Ye Tian's body.

Many of the treasures on Ye Tian's body were placed on this replica body that had been guarding the human race.

So, this broken treasure map was spied at once.

Golden Dots of Light!

Golden Dots of Light!

Golden Dots of Light!

Golden Dots of Light!

In addition to many golden points of light, there were also several purple points of light, and when he saw this scene, he was immediately shocked in his heart.

You must know that the Duowei Treasure Bottle can only be regarded as a golden point of light, and the purple point of light is a treasure that surpasses the golden point of light.

"This Ye Tian Realm Lord actually has so many golden light spot treasures on his body, that is, many treasures comparable to the Duowei Treasure Bottle, and several higher-level treasures that surpass the Duowei Treasure Bottle, I have never seen so many treasures from other Fourth Realms!!!"

The Blazing Sun Realm Lord's heart was extremely excited, and he couldn't wait to snatch all these treasures from Ye Tian's body.

"Not long after the Ye Tian Realm Lord broke through the Fourth Realm, his cultivation is still in the early stage of the Fourth Realm, and he is not as good as me!"

The Blazing Sun Realm Lord said secretly.

Not long after breaking through the fourth realm, it can be judged that Ye Tian's super-dimensional rule realm must not be high, no matter how against the sky, with a hundred super-dimensional rules to break through to the fourth realm, it is estimated that he has just comprehended a hundred and more super-dimensional rules.

Even if he exaggerated and cultivated an innate multi-dimensional Dao body, his combat power was still estimated to be inferior to him.

As the palace master of the Blazing Sun Palace, he is a cultivator in the middle of the fourth realm, and he is not far from the late stage of the fourth realm, and he has also cultivated an innate multi-dimensional Dao body, the Purple Yang Body, and is currently in the first layer of the Xiaocheng realm.

It was precisely by relying on the Purple Yang Body of the first layer of the Xiaocheng Realm that his reputation in the Fourth Realm was not low.

At this moment, he was extremely excited in his heart, and he couldn't wait to attack Ye Tian immediately.

But he held back, because he was still not 100 percent sure.

Once the attack fails and allows Ye Tian to escape, then he doesn't want to find Ye Tian.

Either you don't make a move, or you will succeed 100%.

So, after chatting with Ye Tian for a long time, the Blazing Sun Realm Lord took his leave.

After returning to the Blazing Yang Palace, he immediately summoned the other fourth realm of the Blazing Yang Palace, the Taijiang Realm Lord.

This Taijiang Realm Lord's strength is not as good as his, but he is also a Fourth Realm with quite good strength, which can help him kill the Ye Tian Realm Lord.

Of course, this is not enough.

"Taijiang, come with me to the Four Thousand Territory, and we will take out all our net worth and buy a Taiyi Sword Extinguishing Talisman!" said the Blazing Sun Realm Lord.

"What, take all your net worth to buy a Taiyi Sword Extinguishing Talisman?" Blazing Sun, are you crazy?" The Taijiang Realm Lord stared at the Blazing Yang Palace Lord incredulously, completely not understanding why the Blazing Yang Palace Lord was this.

The Blazing Sun Realm Lord did not hide it, and revealed: "You should know that special treasure on my body, I spied that the Ye Tian Realm Lord has a large number of treasures, and there are treasures on his body that are one grade higher than the Duowei Treasure Bottle, and there is more than one, and there are many treasures comparable to the Duowei Treasure Bottle!"

"Blazing Sun, you want to kill the Ye Heavenly Realm Lord, are you sure?"

The Taijiang Realm Lord asked.

"I'm not sure, that's why I want to buy a Taiyi Sword Destroying Talisman, so that I can be 100% sure. You should know the power of the Taiyi Annihilation Sword Talisman, its internal seal is a sixth dimensional will peerless, once we besiege that Ye Tian Realm Lord, the Taiyi Annihilation Talisman Sword is sacrificed at a critical moment, it is enough to severely damage his soul will, so that his combat effectiveness will be greatly damaged, like that, we can easily kill the other party and snatch the treasure on his body!" said the Blazing Sun Realm Lord.

"Blazing Sun, are you going to do it this time?"

The Taijiang Realm Lord asked.

The extra-dimensional realm of the outside world only thinks that the Blazing Sun Realm Lord in front of him is the true body of the real Blazing Sun Realm Lord, but in fact this is not the case.

Of course, the Blazing Sun Realm Lord has such a special clone because of his special race, and he can cultivate himself and ascend to the fourth realm step by step, but the strength of his body is even stronger.

"Don't use it!"

The Blazing Sun Realm Lord shook his head, "My true body can't be exposed, even if my doppelganger falls, relying on the long years and countless resources, I can re-condense the clone step by step, and then cultivate to the fourth realm step by step." If you do it yourself, if something goes wrong, it's all over!"

"It's okay, it's enough to rely on the two of us anyway, so let's go buy the Taiyi Sword Destroying Sword Talisman first!"

The master of the Taijiang realm responded.
